title: Quick Fix Irish Squash Stir-fry
description: A quick and easy meal rich in flavor with a mix of savory vegetables like squash, pumpkin, and dumplings, perfect for those on the go or looking for a paleo-friendly option.

ingredients.name: 2 cups pumpkin puree (ensure it’s paleo-friendly)
ingredients.notes: Make sure to check for hidden sugars or additives.

ingredients.name: 6 oz dumplings, gluten-free
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are paleo-friendly and gluten-free.

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp coconut oil (or your preferred cooking oil)

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add diced butternut squash and sauté until tender, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in pumpkin puree, minced garlic, salt, and pepper. Let cook for another minute to allow flavors to meld together.
Gently fold dumplings into the mixture, reducing heat to low if necessary to prevent overcooking.
Cook for an additional 3-5 minutes until dumplings are heated through but still slightly firm.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course. Can be served with a dollop of full-fat coconut yogurt and fresh herbs like parsley for extra flavor.
